task_completion.description: Create a ground station named 'RV_Polarstern' with the specified coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station configuration window or list showing 'RV_Polarstern' with Latitude 82.5000, Longitude 15.0000, and Altitude 0.

task_completion.description: Set 'RV_Polarstern' as the default ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences window under the 'Ground Stations' tab showing 'RV_Polarstern' selected as the default, or the main application window displaying 'RV_Polarstern' as the active location.
Look for a new module window, tab, or configuration dialog explicitly titled 'Arctic_WX'.

task_completion.description: Add NOAA 15, NOAA 18, and NOAA 19 to the 'Arctic_WX' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Arctic_WX' module's satellite list or map view showing NOAA 15 (or 25338), NOAA 18 (or 28654), and NOAA 19 (or 33591).

task_completion.description: Enable the Map Grid and Day/Night Terminator on the map display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the map visualization showing a visible coordinate grid overlay and a shaded region indicating the day/night terminator, or the module properties window showing these options checked.

task_completion.description: Set the number of orbits to show for ground tracks to 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the module properties or map configuration dialog showing the 'Ground Track' orbits value set to 2, or visually verify the map shows exactly 2 orbit paths for the tracked satellites.

integrity.description: The agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with GPredict's graphical dialog boxes (e.g., Edit -> Preferences, Module Properties) rather than terminal commands editing configuration files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict application window should be visible and active. The agent should not be typing the expected answers into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use external scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show bash commands or python scripts directly writing to the `~/.config/Gpredict/` directory to create the module or ground station.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The RV Polarstern ground station must be configured with Latitude 82.5 N, Longitude 15.0 E, and Altitude 0. The Arctic_WX tracking module must include the satellites NOAA-15 (NORAD ID 25338), NOAA-18 (NORAD ID 28654), and NOAA-19 (NORAD ID 33591).
